# RedResumes — Free ATS-Friendly Resume Builder with AI Writing Help

## About
RedResumes is a free online resume builder that helps job seekers create ATS-optimized resumes using professionally designed templates and AI-powered writing assistance. The tool generates resumes in PDF format, making it easy to apply directly to job listings. RedResumes is designed for anyone who needs a polished, recruiter-ready resume without paying for a professional writing service.

## What We Do
- Build ATS-friendly resumes that pass applicant tracking systems
- Provide AI-powered writing suggestions for bullet points and summaries
- Offer professionally designed resume templates for all industries
- Export finished resumes as downloadable PDF files
- Guide users through each resume section step by step

## Who We Serve
Job seekers at all career levels — from recent graduates to experienced professionals — who want a fast, free way to build a standout resume without design or writing expertise.

## Key Pages
- Homepage / Resume Builder: https://redresumes.com/
- Resume Templates: https://redresumes.com/templates
- Pricing / Plans: https://redresumes.com/pricing
- FAQ: https://redresumes.com/faq

https://redresumes.com/contact

## Update Frequency
Content updated regularly. Resume templates and AI features updated monthly.
